item.name: Shishioji Flute
item.description: The spirited song of this flute is said to summon Shishioji, a princely fragment of Shishio, legendary auspice and king of the nue.

mount.name: Shishioji
mount.action: Summon forth Shishioji, a prince who just can't wait to be king (again).
mount.description: When the mighty Shishio, legendary auspice and king of the nue, was defeated, it shed a fragment of its malevolent will, which took form as this being. Possessing a will of its own, it recognizes you as its superior, and consents to bearing you upon its back.
mount.tooltip:
Doubtless the lion's share
of the credit lies with me.
- Nero tol Scaeva
